name: Obsidian AI Bridge
notes: Obsidian plugin 0.1.4 no longer queues tasks when the web connector is offline or stale. It clears stale connector state and shows a direct instruction to connect from the userscript menu.
Web connector 0.1.7 improves text insertion for contenteditable inputs, adds a send-button fallback, and falls back to Enter when no send button is found.
Gemini support remains enabled for https://gemini.google.com/*.
